elasticmapreduce.cluster.scalingaction.C: `ScalingAction` is a subproperty of the `ScalingRule` property type. `ScalingAction` determines the type of adjustment the automatic scaling activity makes when triggered, and the periodicity of the adjustment.

elasticmapreduce.cluster.scalingaction.M.Description: Not available for instance groups. Instance groups use the market type specified for the group.

elasticmapreduce.cluster.scalingaction.S.Description: The type of adjustment the automatic scaling activity makes when triggered, and the periodicity of the adjustment.
